x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Value
x-enumeration-literals.description: Value of the asset holding based on current market prices (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Book Value
x-enumeration-literals.description: Value of a security, as booked/acquired in an account. Book value is often different from the current market value of the security. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cap Value
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maximum notional value for a financial instrument that is capped.
